column1: # 外交對白(DIPLOMSE.LBX,786 條)。英文原文即 key,\xNN 變數(\x80 對方稱你/皇帝名、
# \x81 你的種族、\x82 對方帝國、\x83 對方皇帝、\x84 冠詞 a/an)。中文保留資料標記、略冠詞。批次逐步補。
You are destined to fail, \x80. It is the law of evolution: the weak species will die, and only the strong will remain.
column2: 你注定失敗,\x80。這是演化的法則:弱者將滅亡,唯有強者長存。

column1: Your presence makes me ill, Emperor \x80. Nothing you say is of any consequence to the great \x82 Empire.
column2: 你的存在令我作嘔,\x80 皇帝。你所說的一切,對偉大的 \x82 帝國都毫無意義。

column1: Keep your worthless ships out of \x82 space, foolish \x80. We will not tolerate any trouble from you or your kind.
column2: 讓你那些無用的船艦滾出 \x82 領域,愚蠢的 \x80。我們不會容忍你或你的同類製造任何麻煩。

column1: The entire \x81 race will kneel before the mighty \x82 Empire, \x80. It is only a matter of time.
column2: 整個 \x81 種族都將臣服於強大的 \x82 帝國腳下,\x80。這只是時間問題。

column1: The only thing worse than \x84 \x81 citizen is \x84 \x81 Emperor. Your defeat will be swift but your death slow and painful.
column2: 比一個 \x81 公民更糟的,就只有一個 \x81 皇帝。你的敗亡將迅速,但你的死亡將緩慢而痛苦。

column1: The \x81 people are as weak as they are ugly.  We will destroy you all, \x80.
column2: \x81 人既軟弱又醜陋。我們會將你們全數消滅,\x80。

column1: Your people are only fit as slaves to the noble \x82 Empire. Your utter destruction is inevitable.
column2: 你的人民只配做高貴 \x82 帝國的奴隸。你的徹底毀滅無可避免。

column1: Death to the \x81 race! First, we'll destroy your ships. Then, we'll destroy your planets. We will not rest until you are gone!
column2: \x81 種族去死吧!我們會先摧毀你的船艦,再摧毀你的行星。不將你抹除,我們絕不罷休!

column1: Seeing you defeated will not be enough. It is your death, and the extinction of your entire race that I look forward to!
column2: 光是看你戰敗還不夠。我期盼的是你的死亡,以及你整個種族的滅絕!

column1: Your mere presence makes my skin crawl with revulsion, \x80. Be gone from \x82 space, or you will be destroyed.
column2: 光是你的存在就令我厭惡得渾身起雞皮疙瘩,\x80。滾出 \x82 領域,否則你將被摧毀。

column1: Your empire is pathetic, \x80. I will personally see to your utter destruction.
column2: 你的帝國可悲至極,\x80。我會親自確保你被徹底摧毀。

column1: Emperor \x80 be warned: the \x82 Empire has arrived to free the galaxy from the \x81 terror.
column2: \x80 皇帝,警告你:\x82 帝國已然降臨,要將銀河自 \x81 的恐怖中解放。

column1: The \x82 Empire will crush you utterly, \x80. Do not attempt to resist us.
column2: \x82 帝國將徹底粉碎你,\x80。別妄想抵抗我們。

column1: Do not attempt to stand in the way of \x82 mastery, foolish \x81. We will rule the galaxy; you are powerless to stop us!
column2: 別妄想阻擋 \x82 的霸業,愚蠢的 \x81。我們將統治銀河;你無力阻止!

column1: Fear me, \x80, for I speak for the mighty \x82 Empire: we will destroy you and all those who stand with you!
column2: 畏懼我吧,\x80,因為我代表強大的 \x82 帝國:我們將消滅你,以及所有與你為伍之人!

column1: You cannot succeed in your feeble attempts at mastery, \x80. The \x82 Empire will always prevail!
column2: 你那些軟弱的稱霸企圖不可能成功,\x80。\x82 帝國永遠勝利!

column1: The mighty \x82 Empire has a unified goal, Emperor \x80: to erase your empire from this galaxy!
column2: 強大的 \x82 帝國有一個共同目標,\x80 皇帝:將你的帝國自這個銀河抹除!

column1: Your destruction is inevitable, foolish \x81.  The \x82 Empire is destined to rule the galaxy!
column2: 你的毀滅無可避免,愚蠢的 \x81。\x82 帝國注定要統治銀河!

column1: Greetings, Emperor \x80! I am glad to finally meet you in person, it will make watching your destruction so much more pleasurable.
column2: 你好,\x80 皇帝!很高興終於能與你當面相見,這將使目睹你的毀滅更加愉悅。

column1: I hope that your race will last long enough to give my people a little sport, \x80. Like a cat with a mouse, we enjoy playing with our prey before destroying it.
column2: 我希望你的種族能撐得夠久,好讓我的人民玩樂一番,\x80。就像貓戲弄老鼠,我們喜歡在摧毀獵物前先把玩一番。

column1: Fear not, Emperor \x80. After your defeat, your people will be welcomed into the \x82 kingdom as the worthy slaves they are.
column2: 別害怕,\x80 皇帝。在你戰敗之後,你的人民將以其應得的奴隸身分,被 \x82 王國接納。

column1: Pray to whatever gods motivate you, \x80. We are coming for your ships, your planets, your people.
column2: 向任何能激勵你的神明祈禱吧,\x80。我們要來奪取你的船艦、你的行星、你的人民。

column1: I see that the competition has arrived. Let the games begin!
column2: 我看到對手已經到來。讓遊戲開始吧!

column1: So you are what passes for an emperor in the \x81 kingdom. You are truly much more pathetic than I ever imagined.
column2: 原來這就是 \x81 王國所謂的皇帝。你確實比我想像的還要可悲得多。

column1: The glorious \x82 Empire is here to dethrone you, \x80. But don't worry, Emperor \x83 will let you live on as a personal slave.
column2: 光榮的 \x82 帝國前來將你趕下王位,\x80。但別擔心,\x83 皇帝會讓你以私人奴隸的身分活下去。

column1: A fine empire you have built, Emperor \x80. It will be a worthy addition to the mighty \x82 kingdom!
column2: 你建立了一個不錯的帝國,\x80 皇帝。它將成為強大 \x82 王國一個值得的補充!

column1: Please do not surrender, dear \x80. The \x82 military is anxious to meet you in battle; the odds-makers are even giving you a 10% chance of surviving!
column2: 拜託別投降,親愛的 \x80。\x82 軍隊迫不及待想在戰場上會會你;連賭盤都給了你 10% 的存活機率呢!

column1: Keep your distance \x81 emperor. We will tolerate no interference.
column2: 保持距離,\x81 皇帝。我們不容許任何干涉。

column1: Do not provoke the \x82 Empire, \x80. We will attack if you remain too close to territory that is rightfully ours.
column2: 別激怒 \x82 帝國,\x80。若你仍逗留在本屬我們的領土附近,我們將發動攻擊。

column1: I see that the \x81 race is attempting expansion. Just don't look to expand into \x82 space, or we will attack with force.
column2: 我看到 \x81 種族正試圖擴張。只是別想擴張進 \x82 領域,否則我們將以武力攻擊。

column1: I must admit, now that I've met you I like the \x81 race even less. Stay away from the \x82 Empire, it's business is no concern of yours.
column2: 我得承認,見過你之後,我更不喜歡 \x81 種族了。離 \x82 帝國遠一點,它的事與你無關。

column1: I am not interested in what you have to say, \x80, your aggressive actions speak for themselves. Just stay away, or you will be destroyed!
column2: 我對你要說的話沒興趣,\x80,你的侵略行動已說明了一切。給我離遠點,否則你將被摧毀!

column1: Learn to be content with what you have, Emperor \x80. You will get nothing from us.
column2: 學著滿足於你所擁有的,\x80 皇帝。你從我們這兒什麼也得不到。

column1: We are watching your moves closely, \x81 emperor. Any aggressive acts will be met in kind.
column2: 我們正密切注視你的一舉一動,\x81 皇帝。任何侵略行為都將遭到同等回應。

column1: I am warning you, \x80 of the \x81 Empire: your presence is not welcome. Keep your ships out of \x82 space.
column2: 我警告你,\x81 帝國的 \x80:你並不受歡迎。讓你的船艦滾出 \x82 領域。

column1: Greetings, Emperor \x80. The \x82 people pray for peace between us and the honorable \x81 people.
column2: 你好,\x80 皇帝。\x82 人民祈願我們與尊貴的 \x81 人民之間和平共處。

column1: The galaxy offers a great many treasures, Emperor \x80. It is our hope that we can share this vast wealth of resources.
column2: 銀河蘊藏著眾多寶藏,\x80 皇帝。我們希望能共享這片龐大的資源財富。

column1: There is always tension when two empires first meet, Emperor \x80. Let us do our best to allay those fears, and work towards an age of peace and prosperity.
column2: 兩個帝國初次相會時總有緊張,\x80 皇帝。讓我們盡力消除這些疑慮,共同邁向和平與繁榮的時代。

column1: The \x82 Empire delights in this first contact between our races, Emperor \x80, and looks forward to profitable dealings between us.
column2: \x82 帝國對我們兩族的首次接觸感到欣喜,\x80 皇帝,並期盼雙方能有互利的往來。

column1: We have heard many things about the great \x81 Empire. We hope you will come to trust us as allies and friends.
column2: 我們聽聞了許多關於偉大 \x81 帝國的事。願你日後能信任我們,視我們為盟友與朋友。

column1: I believe that both our races will benefit from a policy of cooperation, Emperor \x80. Let us work towards peaceful coexistence.
column2: 我相信合作的方針將使我們兩族都受益,\x80 皇帝。讓我們共同邁向和平共存。

column1: It is easy to see why the \x81 people have chosen you to lead them, wise and honorable \x80. We welcome the chance to trade, share, and learn from you.
column2: 不難看出 \x81 人民為何選你來領導他們,睿智而尊貴的 \x80。我們樂於有機會與你貿易、分享並向你學習。

column1: We will deal fairly with you, Emperor \x80, as long as you show us the same consideration.
column2: 我們會公平待你,\x80 皇帝,只要你也以同樣的體諒回報我們。

column1: The year \x8e will go down in history as the first time we encountered the great \x81 Empire!
column2: \x8e 年將載入史冊,成為我們首次與偉大 \x81 帝國相遇之時!

column1: I greet you on behalf of the \x82 Empire, mighty \x80. May our people live together in harmony.
column2: 我謹代表 \x82 帝國向你致意,強大的 \x80。願我們的人民和睦共處。

column1: The \x82 people are a quiet and peaceful race, your majesty. We look forward to a harmonious coexistence with the noble \x81.
column2: \x82 人民是個安靜而愛好和平的種族,陛下。我們期盼與尊貴的 \x81 和諧共存。

column1: Hail Emperor \x80! I come to you in the spirit of brotherhood to welcome you to \x82 space.
column2: 萬歲,\x80 皇帝!我懷著手足之情前來,歡迎你來到 \x82 領域。

column1: Let there be no blood shed on this glorious and beautiful day, the first meeting between the \x81 and \x82 Empires!
column2: 願在這光榮而美麗的一天,\x81 與 \x82 帝國的首次會面,不流一滴血!

column1: The gods have smiled down on us, to give us the opportunity to forge a lasting bond between the \x82 people and your glorious empire, Emperor \x80.
column2: 諸神眷顧我們,賜予我們機會,在 \x82 人民與你光榮的帝國之間締結長久的紐帶,\x80 皇帝。

column1: It is our intention to pursue a peaceful relationship between our people, Emperor \x80.
column2: 我們有意在兩族人民之間追求和平的關係,\x80 皇帝。

column1: The peaceful \x82 people welcome the chance to live side by side the honorable \x81s.
column2: 愛好和平的 \x82 人民樂於有機會與尊貴的 \x81 比鄰而居。

column1: There is plenty here for all, Emperor \x80. A lasting policy of friendship will serve to benefit both our empires.
column2: 這裡的資源足夠所有人共享,\x80 皇帝。長久的友好方針將使我們兩個帝國都受益。

column1: The \x82 people feel no fear seeing glorious \x81 ships speed through our night skies. We know that you will honor us with peace and brotherhood.
column2: \x82 人民見到光榮的 \x81 船艦掠過我們的夜空,毫無懼意。我們深信你將以和平與手足之情待我們。

column1: No purpose would be served by anger or mistrust between us, Emperor \x80. Our empires can both grow to prosper in this wide galaxy.
column2: 我們之間的憤怒或猜忌毫無意義,\x80 皇帝。我們兩個帝國都能在這遼闊的銀河中成長繁榮。

column1: The \x82 Empire honors you with its presence yet again, \x80.
column2: \x82 帝國再次以其蒞臨向你致意,\x80。

column1: The great Emperor \x83 acknowledges your existence, \x81 leader.
column2: 偉大的 \x83 皇帝承認你的存在,\x81 領袖。

column1: It is a pleasure to re-establish contact with the \x81 Empire, \x80.
column2: 很高興能與 \x81 帝國重新建立聯繫,\x80。

column1: It is \x8e, and we are ready to open the lines of communication between our empires once again.
column2: 如今是 \x8e 年,我們已準備好再次開啟兩個帝國之間的溝通管道。

column1: The \x82 Empire is surprised to find you are still around, Emperor \x80. Perhaps you are not as pathetic as we thought.
column2: \x82 帝國很驚訝你竟然還在,\x80 皇帝。或許你不如我們想的那麼可悲。

column1: Again we meet, \x80. The pleasure is all yours, I'm sure.
column2: 我們又見面了,\x80。這份榮幸想必全歸你所有。

column1: Mighty \x83, Emperor of the \x82 people, sends greetings now that the lines of communication have reopened.
column2: 強大的 \x83,\x82 人民的皇帝,在溝通管道重啟之際向你致意。

column1: Don't think we've forgotten about you, \x80. We're still watching your every move.
column2: 別以為我們忘了你,\x80。我們仍在注視你的一舉一動。

column1: Greetings once again, \x80. Perhaps renewed contact between us will benefit us both.
column2: 再次問候你,\x80。或許我們重啟聯繫能讓雙方都受益。

column1: Our relationship has been somewhat strained, \x80, but I assure you, Emperor \x83 holds you in high regard.
column2: 我們的關係一直有些緊繃,\x80,但我向你保證,\x83 皇帝十分敬重你。

column1: I am at your service, Emperor \x80. Please do not hesitate to call should you need anything.
column2: 我為你效勞,\x80 皇帝。若你有任何需要,請儘管吩咐。

column1: Just a friendly reminder: as ambassador to the \x82 people, I am here to assist you if I can, mighty Emperor \x80.
column2: 只是友善地提醒一下:身為駐 \x82 人民的大使,只要我能幫上忙,我隨時為你效勞,強大的 \x80 皇帝。

column1: Hail, kind \x80. The fellowship between our two peoples lives on now that we can communicate freely once again.
column2: 萬歲,仁慈的 \x80。如今我們能再次自由溝通,我們兩族的情誼將延續下去。

column1: I am pleased to report that your popularity runs high in the \x82 nation, great Emperor \x80.
column2: 我很高興地稟報,你在 \x82 國度中聲望甚高,偉大的 \x80 皇帝。

column1: I shudder each time you come before me, \x80. Too bad communication is possible again, as time has not lessened my revulsion of you and your kind.
column2: 每次你出現在我面前,我都不寒而慄,\x80。可惜又能溝通了,時間並未減輕我對你及你同類的厭惡。

column1: I have warned you that we will tolerate no interference. Your continued presence is an affront to me.
column2: 我早已警告過你,我們不容許任何干涉。你持續的存在是對我的冒犯。

column1: I remind you now that we have contact again: the wrath of the \x82 Empire is terrible, \x80. Keep that in mind in our dealings.
column2: 趁我們又能聯繫,我提醒你:\x82 帝國的怒火十分可怕,\x80。在我們往來時記住這點。

column1: I would just as soon kill you as speak to you, \x81 scum, but the mighty \x82 Emperor commands that I reopen communications.
column2: 我寧可殺了你也不願與你交談,\x81 敗類,但強大的 \x82 皇帝下令我重啟溝通。

column1: Now that the lines of communication are open again, I can at last deliver this message: it is time for you to consider the merits of surrendering to the \x82 Empire before it's too late.
column2: 既然溝通管道又已開啟,我終於能傳達這則訊息:是時候該考慮在為時已晚之前,向 \x82 帝國投降的好處了。

column1: Emperor \x83 is hereby reopening diplomatic channels. But don't get your hopes up, for we still hate the \x81 Empire.
column2: \x83 皇帝在此重啟外交管道。但別抱太大希望,因為我們依舊憎恨 \x81 帝國。

column1: Again we meet. The time that passed since we had communication was blissful, too bad it had to end.
column2: 我們又見面了。自上次溝通以來的這段時間何等幸福,可惜它得結束了。

column1: Have we met before? It matters not, I still bear the same message from Emperor \x83: beware!
column2: 我們以前見過嗎?那不重要,我依然帶著 \x83 皇帝同樣的訊息:當心!

column1: Tensions run high, \x80. Pay close attention to your diplomatic duties in times such as these.
column2: 局勢緊張,\x80。在這種時刻,請密切留意你的外交事務。

column1: Although we lost contact, we know your dealings have been less than honorable, Emperor \x80. Will your words be more than lies in the future?
column2: 儘管我們失去了聯繫,我們知道你的行事並不怎麼光彩,\x80 皇帝。今後你的話語會不只是謊言嗎?

column1: The \x82 Empire is not pleased with you, \x80. It may be too late to heal the wounds between us, even though diplomatic channels have reopened.
column2: \x82 帝國對你並不滿意,\x80。即使外交管道已重啟,要癒合我們之間的裂痕或許也太遲了。

column1: It saddens me that in the time that passed since we could talk, the relations between us have grown so strained, Emperor \x80.
column2: 令我難過的是,自我們上次能交談以來,我們之間的關係竟變得如此緊繃,\x80 皇帝。

column1: Now that contact has been re-established, I must give you a friendly reminder, Emperor \x80. My people prefer peace, \x80, but we are not afraid to fight for what we believe in.
column2: 既然聯繫已重新建立,我得友善地提醒你,\x80 皇帝。我的人民愛好和平,\x80,但我們不畏為信念而戰。

column1: Withdraw your spies at once, or deal with the consequences!
column2: 立刻撤走你的間諜,否則自負後果!

column1: Emperor \x83 demands an immediate halt to all \x81 covert activities in \x82 territory. Disobey, and war will follow.
column2: \x83 皇帝要求立即停止一切 \x81 在 \x82 領土的祕密活動。違抗者,戰爭將隨之而來。

column1: Your espionage is jeopardizing our already weak relationship, \x80. Persist and we may be thrust into unwanted war.
column2: 你的間諜活動正危及我們本已脆弱的關係,\x80。再繼續下去,我們可能被推入誰都不想要的戰爭。

column1: You show your true colors by sending your evil spies to steal our technology. Cease, or we will be at war.
column2: 你派出邪惡的間諜來竊取我們的科技,暴露了你的真面目。住手,否則我們將開戰。

column1: The \x81 have always had a reputation for dishonorable dealing. I can see that reputation is deserved.  Withdraw your spies, fool, or war will result.
column2: \x81 向來以行事不光彩聞名。我看這名聲果然名副其實。撤走你的間諜,蠢貨,否則戰爭將至。

column1: We offer you our friendship, and you respond with underhanded espionage? You have wounded us deeply, \x80. We will be forced to go to war if you do not remove all spies.
column2: 我們向你獻上友誼,你卻以卑鄙的間諜活動回應?你深深傷害了我們,\x80。若你不撤走所有間諜,我們將被迫開戰。

column1: We know what you are up to, Emperor \x80. Get your \x81 spies out of \x82 space, or the price you pay will be great.
column2: 我們知道你在打什麼主意,\x80 皇帝。把你的 \x81 間諜弄出 \x82 領域,否則你將付出慘痛代價。

column1: If you attempt to sabotage any more of our \x8d we will be forced to declare war.
column2: 若你再企圖破壞我們任何的 \x8d,我們將被迫宣戰。

column1: You are testing our patience, \x80. No more malicious sabotage of \x82 facilities or we will be at war.
column2: 你在考驗我們的耐心,\x80。別再惡意破壞 \x82 的設施,否則我們將開戰。

column1: If one more \x82 facility is destroyed by \x81 hands, you will find yourself with a war on your hands.
column2: 若再有一座 \x82 設施毀於 \x81 之手,你將發現自己惹上一場戰爭。

column1: Your sabotage of our \x8d wounds me, \x80. I thought we were better friends than that. Call off your saboteurs, or we will go to war.
column2: 你破壞我們的 \x8d,令我心痛,\x80。我還以為我們是更好的朋友。撤回你的破壞者,否則我們將開戰。

column1: Knock off the sabotage attacks, \x80, or the consequences will be dire.
column2: 停止你的破壞行動,\x80,否則後果不堪設想。

column1: Our \x8d lie in ruin because of you, \x80. Cease this destruction, or your entire empire will reel from the blow we deliver.
column2: 我們的 \x8d 因你而化為廢墟,\x80。停止這種破壞,否則你整個帝國都將因我們的重擊而動搖。

column1: Sabotage is the act of a coward, \x80. If you want a war, just say so, we're ready to destroy you.
column2: 破壞是懦夫的行徑,\x80。若你想要戰爭,直說便是,我們已準備好摧毀你。

column1: We know you ordered the destruction of our \x8d. We warn you, Emperor \x83 will not hesitate to order the destruction of your empire if such attacks continue.
column2: 我們知道是你下令破壞我們的 \x8d。我們警告你,若此類攻擊持續,\x83 皇帝將毫不猶豫地下令摧毀你的帝國。

column1: Emperor \x80, the \x82s feel threatened by your ships. Please remove them from the \x93 at once, or we will go to war.
column2: \x80 皇帝,\x82 人感到你的船艦構成威脅。請立即將它們撤離 \x93,否則我們將開戰。

column1: Your ships would serve you better watching your enemies, not your friends. Or do you mean to make us your enemies? Remove your ships from the \x93 system, or we'll be at war.
column2: 你的船艦用來監視你的敵人會比監視朋友更有用。還是你打算與我們為敵?把你的船艦撤離 \x93 星系,否則我們將開戰。

column1: Your ships are clogging the \x93 skies, \x80. Move them, or we will go to war.
column2: 你的船艦塞滿了 \x93 的天空,\x80。把它們移走,否則我們將開戰。

column1: Putting so many ships in the \x93 system makes it look as if you mean to threaten us. Please eliminate this misundertanding by moving them, or we will declare war.
column2: 在 \x93 星系部署這麼多船艦,看來你是想威脅我們。請把它們移走消除這場誤會,否則我們將宣戰。

column1: Putting so many ships in the \x93 system makes it look as if you mean to threaten us. Please eliminate this misunderstanding by moving them, or we will declare war.
column2: 在 \x93 星系部署這麼多船艦,看來你是想威脅我們。請把它們移走消除這場誤會,否則我們將宣戰。

column1: Move your ships away from the \x93 system, Emperor.  We will destroy you if you do not.
column2: 把你的船艦撤離 \x93 星系,皇帝。若你不從,我們將摧毀你。

column1: We feel we must remind you, \x80, \x93 is not \x84 \x81 military base. Move you ships or we will remove them for you.
column2: 我們認為必須提醒你,\x80,\x93 不是 \x81 的軍事基地。把你的船艦移走,否則我們會替你移走。

column1: Your use of biological weapons is sickening, \x80. If you continue their use, we will go to war.
column2: 你使用生化武器令人作嘔,\x80。若你繼續使用,我們將開戰。

column1: Never, never use such a deplorable device as that again, \x80. We will terminate all diplomatic relations and go to war with any race that uses biological weapons.
column2: 永遠、永遠別再使用那種可鄙的裝置,\x80。我們將終止一切外交關係,並與任何使用生化武器的種族開戰。

column1: Biological weapons kill innocent children, \x80. We will not ally ourselves with baby killers - cease and desist or we will be at war!
column2: 生化武器會殺害無辜的孩童,\x80。我們不會與殺嬰者結盟——住手停止,否則我們將開戰!

column1: We do not approve of biological weaponry. If you use one again, we will systematically destroy your entire empire.
column2: 我們不認同生化武器。若你再度使用,我們將有系統地摧毀你整個帝國。

column1: Emperor \x83 is disgusted by your immoral use of biological weapons. Don't do it again, \x80, or you will find yourself at war.
column2: \x83 皇帝對你不道德地使用生化武器感到厭惡。別再犯,\x80,否則你將陷入戰爭。

column1: The \x82 people mourn for the lives you so callously eradicated. Emperor \x83 warns you: no more bio-weaponry, or we will go to war!
column2: \x82 人民為你如此冷酷抹殺的生命哀悼。\x83 皇帝警告你:別再用生化武器,否則我們將開戰!

column1: We can overlook one bio-weapons attack as the act of an overzealous military, \x80, but see to it that it never happens again, or we will step in and revenge the civilians you slaughter.
column2: 我們可以把一次生化武器攻擊當作某支過度狂熱軍隊的行為而不予追究,\x80,但務必別再發生,否則我們將出手,為你屠殺的平民復仇。

column1: We can scarcely believe that you would utilize such shocking bio-weaponry, \x80. It must never, never happen again, or the wrath  of the \x82 nation will be great.
column2: 我們幾乎無法相信你竟會動用如此駭人的生化武器,\x80。這絕不能、絕不能再發生,否則 \x82 國度的怒火將無比可怕。

column1: Remove your blockade, Emperor \x80, or we will be forced to retaliate
column2: 撤除你的封鎖,\x80 皇帝,否則我們將被迫報復

column1: We do not appreciate the blockade you've imposed on our people, \x80. Disband it, or we will go to war to tear it down.
column2: 我們不欣賞你對我們人民施加的封鎖,\x80。解除它,否則我們將開戰將其摧毀。

column1: Please, do not make the \x82 people suffer any longer. Move your blockade and let peace come back into their lives.
column2: 拜託,別再讓 \x82 人民受苦了。撤除你的封鎖,讓和平重回他們的生活。

column1: The \x81 ships blockading our system must be removed this instant!
column2: 封鎖我們星系的 \x81 船艦必須立刻撤走!

column1: If the blockade you have imposed upon us is not ended right now, the next message you have from the \x82 Empire will be one of war.
column2: 若你對我們施加的封鎖不立刻結束,你從 \x82 帝國收到的下一則訊息將是宣戰。

column1: Emperor \x83 commands you to remove the blockade.
column2: \x83 皇帝命令你撤除封鎖。

column1: You will find that if you do not remove your blockade around the \x82 system, you will soon be at war.
column2: 你會發現,若你不撤除對 \x82 星系的封鎖,你很快就會陷入戰爭。

column1: I bear a message from the great \x82 Emperor: cancel your blockade or we will declare war on the \x81 people.
column2: 我帶來偉大 \x82 皇帝的訊息:取消你的封鎖,否則我們將向 \x81 人民宣戰。

column1: Your economic expansion is getting out of hand, Emperor \x80. Slow down, or we will be forced to go to war to protect our interests.
column2: 你的經濟擴張正逐漸失控,\x80 皇帝。放慢腳步,否則我們將被迫開戰以保護我們的利益。

column1: Don't be a power hungry fool, \x80. We will be forced to go to war with you if you continue to threaten our economic growth by hoarding money and resources.
column2: 別做個貪權的蠢貨,\x80。若你繼續囤積金錢與資源、威脅我們的經濟成長,我們將被迫與你開戰。

column1: You are grabbing economic power quickly and recklessly, \x80. Be careful, or your \x82 friends will become enemies.
column2: 你正迅速而魯莽地攫取經濟力量,\x80。當心,否則你的 \x82 朋友將變成敵人。

column1: You are growing over ambitious, Emperor \x80. We warn you not to upset the balance of the galactic economy, or we will declare war.
column2: 你變得野心過大,\x80 皇帝。我們警告你別擾亂銀河經濟的平衡,否則我們將宣戰。

column1: So, trying to throw your weight around a little, eh? You think voting against us in the Council gains you a little attention? Rethink that strategy, or we may have to beat a little sense into you.
column2: 怎麼,想耍點威風?你以為在議會投票反對我們能博得一點關注?重新想想這個策略,否則我們可能得好好教訓你一頓,讓你清醒點。

column1: If you are not for us, \x80, you are against us. We will not hesitate to destroy you if you continue to make yourself an enemy of the \x82 Empire.
column2: 若你不站在我們這邊,\x80,你就是與我們為敵。若你繼續與 \x82 帝國為敵,我們將毫不猶豫地摧毀你。

column1: Just a misunderstanding, yes? You meant to vote for the \x82 Emperor but made a mistake. We understand, and give you one more chance to correct your vote at the next meeting. Otherwise, war!
column2: 只是個誤會,是吧?你本想投給 \x82 皇帝卻投錯了。我們理解,並在下次會議給你一次改正選票的機會。否則,開戰!

column1: The \x82 ruler needs your vote, \x80. Next time, vote for us, and you will see what valuable friends we can be. Vote against us, and you will see what dreaded enemies we make.
column2: \x82 統治者需要你的一票,\x80。下次投給我們,你將見識我們能成為多麼寶貴的朋友。投票反對我們,你將見識我們能成為多麼可怕的敵人。

column1: The \x82 Emperor is a little, shall we say, disappointed with your last vote, \x80. Don't displease us again, or there will be grave consequences.
column2: \x82 皇帝對你上次的投票,可以說是,有點失望,\x80。別再惹怒我們,否則後果不堪設想。

column1: You voted incorrectly, \x80. You were supposed to vote for the \x82s, remember? Get it right next time, or you will find yourself at war.
column2: 你投錯了,\x80。你本該投給 \x82 人,記得嗎?下次投對,否則你將陷入戰爭。

column1: The \x82 Emperor is the only fit leader for the council. Next time, vote accordingly, or the price will be your destruction.
column2: \x82 皇帝是議會唯一適任的領袖。下次照此投票,否則代價將是你的毀滅。

column1: The \x82 Empire is aware of your petty espionage attempts, \x80. We will break the \x8a unless you give me a gift: \x95.
column2: \x82 帝國知道你那些微不足道的間諜企圖,\x80。除非你送我一份禮物,否則我們將撕毀 \x8a:\x95。

column1: Emperor \x83 has two demands - that you remove your spies from our territory, and that you give us: \x95. Otherwise, the \x8a is gone.
column2: \x83 皇帝有兩項要求——你撤走在我們領土的間諜,並給我們:\x95。否則,\x8a 就此作廢。

column1: We are aware of the malicious activity of \x81 saboteurs in our territory, \x80. We demand repayment, or we will cancel all treaties. Give us: \x95.
column2: 我們知道 \x81 破壞者在我們領土的惡意活動,\x80。我們要求賠償,否則將取消所有條約。給我們:\x95。

column1: We will break the current \x8a unless you cease the sabotage attacks and give us: \x95.
column2: 除非你停止破壞攻擊並給我們:\x95,否則我們將撕毀現行的 \x8a。

column1: The increasing number of your ships in the \x93 system makes us nervous. Pacify us with a gift, or you will find all treaties called off. We want: \x95.
column2: 你在 \x93 星系日益增多的船艦令我們不安。以一份禮物安撫我們,否則你將發現所有條約作廢。我們要:\x95。

column1: We will break the \x8a unless you remove your ships from \x93 and give us: \x95.
column2: 除非你把船艦撤離 \x93 並給我們:\x95,否則我們將撕毀 \x8a。

column1: Your use of biological weaponry has upset us, Emperor \x80. All \x81 treaties will be canceled unless you give us something to help us forget: \x95.
column2: 你使用生化武器令我們不快,\x80 皇帝。除非你給我們一些能讓我們遺忘的東西,否則所有 \x81 條約都將被取消:\x95。

column1: We will cancel the current \x81/\x82\x8a unless you give us: \x95. This will help us forget your use of hideous bio-weaponry.
column2: 除非你給我們:\x95,否則我們將取消現行的 \x81/\x82\x8a。這將幫助我們遺忘你使用可怕生化武器的事。

column1: Your senseless blockade of our system is jeopardizing our treaties, \x80. We will end all relations with you unless you give us: \x95.
column2: 你對我們星系無謂的封鎖正危及我們的條約,\x80。除非你給我們:\x95,否則我們將終止與你的一切關係。

column1: Your recent economic expansion has not gone unnoticed. Grand Emperor \x83 will break all treaties unless you pay us with: \x95!
column2: 你近來的經濟擴張並未被忽視。除非你以 \x95 償付我們,否則大皇帝 \x83 將撕毀所有條約!

column1: We do not appreciate your recent economic expansion, \x80. We demand a gift, or the \x8a will be repealed: \x95.
column2: 我們不欣賞你近來的經濟擴張,\x80。我們要求一份禮物,否則 \x8a 將被廢除:\x95。

column1: Your decision to not vote for Emperor \x83 has angered the \x82 Empire. Give us: \x95, or you will find all treaties are off!
column2: 你決定不投票給 \x83 皇帝,激怒了 \x82 帝國。給我們:\x95,否則你將發現所有條約作廢!

column1: The \x8a required you to vote for Emperor \x83. Now you must give us something to forget this indiscretion, or the treaty is off: \x95.
column2: \x8a 要求你投票給 \x83 皇帝。如今你必須給我們一些東西來遺忘這次失禮,否則條約作廢:\x95。

column1: You dare go against the wishes of the great Emperor \x83? You will pay dearly for this!
column2: 你膽敢違背偉大 \x83 皇帝的意願?你將為此付出慘痛代價!

column1: Do not think that you can get away with this insolence, \x80!
column2: 別以為你能就這樣逃過這番傲慢,\x80!

column1: You will pay for that decision, foolish \x81 dog!
column2: 你將為那個決定付出代價,愚蠢的 \x81 走狗!

column1: You will learn to regret that decision, Emperor \x80!
column2: 你將學會後悔那個決定,\x80 皇帝!

column1: Emperor \x83 is pleased that you saw the light, \x80. You've made a wise decision.
column2: \x83 皇帝很高興你看清了真相,\x80。你做了明智的決定。

column1: You are very wise indeed, Emperor \x80.
column2: 你確實非常睿智,\x80 皇帝。

column1: We are happy to see that you are capable of such wise decisions, Emperor \x80.
column2: 我們很高興看到你能做出如此明智的決定,\x80 皇帝。

column1: I cannot keep any treaties with someone that will go behind my back and steal technology! Our \x8a will be canceled if you do not stop.
column2: 我無法與一個會在我背後偷竊科技的人維持任何條約!若你不停手,我們的 \x8a 將被取消。

column1: Let me make this simple for you, \x80 - remove your spies from our territory, or we will cancel the current \x8a.
column2: 讓我把話說簡單點,\x80——把你的間諜撤出我們的領土,否則我們將取消現行的 \x8a。

column1: Your sabotage attempts have strained our diplomatic relations, \x80. Be careful, or we may find cause to end our \x8a.
column2: 你的破壞企圖使我們的外交關係緊繃,\x80。當心,否則我們可能找到理由終止我們的 \x8a。

column1: We are aware of your petty sabotage attacks in our territory, \x80. Call them off, or we will cancel the \x8a.
column2: 我們知道你在我們領土那些微不足道的破壞攻擊,\x80。撤回它們,否則我們將取消 \x8a。

column1: The increasing number of \x81 ships in the \x93 system making us doubt your intentions to honor our \x8a. Be warned: we will break the treaty if they aren't moved.
column2: \x93 星系日益增多的 \x81 船艦令我們懷疑你信守 \x8a 的意圖。警告你:若不撤走,我們將撕毀條約。

column1: Be warned - your fleet of ships in the \x93 system jeopardizes our \x8a.
column2: 警告你——你在 \x93 星系的艦隊危及我們的 \x8a。

column1: We have doubts about dealing with someone that would order the use of bio-weaponry.  We will break the current \x8a at the slightest provocation, \x80.
column2: 我們對與一個會下令使用生化武器的人往來心存疑慮。只要有一點挑釁,我們就會撕毀現行的 \x8a,\x80。

column1: Your deplorable use of biological weapons makes us doubt the value of the \x8a. Be warned - we will cancel it if you provoke us further.
column2: 你可鄙地使用生化武器,令我們懷疑 \x8a 的價值。警告你——若你再挑釁我們,我們將取消它。

column1: We do not appreciate your placing a blockade around our star system, \x80. We suggest that you remove it, and do nothing further to provoke us, or we will break the \x8a.
column2: 我們不欣賞你在我們星系周圍設下封鎖,\x80。我們建議你撤除它,別再做任何挑釁我們的事,否則我們將撕毀 \x8a。

column1: Remove your blockade or the \x8a is off, \x80.
column2: 撤除你的封鎖,否則 \x8a 作廢,\x80。

column1: I have a message from Emperor \x83: scale down your economic expansion and leave us alone, or we will cancel the \x8a.
column2: 我有一則來自 \x83 皇帝的訊息:縮減你的經濟擴張,別來煩我們,否則我們將取消 \x8a。

column1: Vote against Emperor \x83 again, and you will find that the \x8a with the \x82 has been canceled!
column2: 再投票反對 \x83 皇帝,你將發現與 \x82 的 \x8a 已被取消!

column1: Emperor \x80, your persistent espionage attempts leave us with no choice but to break our current \x92.
column2: \x80 皇帝,你持續的間諜企圖讓我們別無選擇,只能撕毀我們現行的 \x92。

column1: Enough. Our \x92 is broken - thus are the consequences of your repeated infiltration of spies onto our planets!
column2: 夠了。我們的 \x92 已破裂——這就是你一再將間諜滲透到我們行星上的後果!

column1: You have pushed us too far, Emperor. You could have asked for technology, instead you stole it. Now our \x92 is forever broken.
column2: 你把我們逼得太過分了,皇帝。你本可要求科技,卻選擇偷竊。如今我們的 \x92 永遠破裂了。

column1: We will no longer associate ourselves with \x81 thieves. Our \x92 is history, \x80.
column2: 我們不再與 \x81 竊賊來往。我們的 \x92 已成過去,\x80。

column1: The \x82 Empire declares the \x92 between us broken. Your repeated thievery has left us no other option.
column2: \x82 帝國宣布我們之間的 \x92 破裂。你一再的竊盜讓我們別無選擇。

column1: You can no longer be trusted, Emperor \x80. Your continued spying has broken the \x92 we had.
column2: 你不再值得信任,\x80 皇帝。你持續的間諜活動已破壞了我們的 \x92。

column1: You have taken too much from the noble \x82 Empire. Our formal \x92 is no more due to your malicious espionage!
column2: 你從高貴的 \x82 帝國奪走太多。由於你惡意的間諜活動,我們正式的 \x92 不復存在!

column1: Your insidious thievery is an offense to Emperor \x83. The \x92 we had has been repealed.
column2: 你陰險的竊盜是對 \x83 皇帝的冒犯。我們的 \x92 已被廢除。

column1: Your sabotage proves you cannot be trusted. We regret that we must cancel our \x92.
column2: 你的破壞證明你不值得信任。我們很遺憾必須取消我們的 \x92。

column1: After all the work that went into forging our \x92, and you destroy it with sabotage? For shame, \x80.
column2: 為締結我們的 \x92 付出那麼多努力,你卻以破壞將它摧毀?真可恥,\x80。

column1: You have severed the \x92 between us with your heinous sabotage attacks, Emperor \x80.
column2: 你以卑劣的破壞攻擊斬斷了我們之間的 \x92,\x80 皇帝。

column1: \x8d can be rebuilt, \x80, but our \x92 will never be repaired.
column2: \x8d 可以重建,\x80,但我們的 \x92 永遠無法修復。

column1: Your continued sabotage attacks cost us both resources and lives, Emperor.  The \x92 between us is no more!
column2: 你持續的破壞攻擊使我們雙方都付出了資源與生命的代價,皇帝。我們之間的 \x92 不復存在!

column1: We will not look the other way while you destroy our \x8d, stupid \x81. Our \x92 is over!
column2: 我們不會在你摧毀我們 \x8d 時視而不見,愚蠢的 \x81。我們的 \x92 結束了!

column1: \x82 \x8d will no longer fall to your treachery, \x80. The \x92 is broken.
column2: \x82 \x8d 不會再毀於你的背叛,\x80。\x92 破裂了。

column1: Emperor \x83 has called for the severing of our \x92 since we discovered you were behind the destruction of \x82 facilities.
column2: 自從我們發現破壞 \x82 設施的幕後黑手是你,\x83 皇帝便下令斬斷我們的 \x92。

column1: Amassing a fleet in the \x93 system can only be interpreted as a prelude to war. Our \x92 is broken.
column2: 在 \x93 星系集結艦隊只能被解讀為戰爭的前奏。我們的 \x92 破裂了。

column1: The presence of so many of your troops in \x93 space is offensive, \x80. Our \x92 is broken.
column2: 你在 \x93 領域部署如此多的部隊令人反感,\x80。我們的 \x92 破裂了。

column1: We will no longer listen to \x80 words of peace while your warships darkening \x93 skies. Our \x92 is null and void.
column2: 當你的戰艦遮蔽 \x93 的天空時,我們不會再聆聽 \x80 的和平之詞。我們的 \x92 已然無效。

column1: There are simply too many \x81 ships in the \x93 system. You obviously don't trust us, why should we trust you? The \x92 we had is no more.
column2: \x93 星系裡就是有太多 \x81 船艦了。你顯然不信任我們,我們又為何要信任你?我們曾有的 \x92 不復存在。

column1: Only one plotting treachery would place so much military might in \x93. The \x92 is broken, you're on your own.
column2: 只有圖謀背叛之人才會在 \x93 部署如此龐大的軍力。\x92 破裂了,你只能靠自己。

column1: Your not so subtle attempt to build up military strength in \x93 has not gone unnoticed, \x80. The \x92 is broken, and it is all your fault.
column2: 你在 \x93 增強軍力那不太高明的企圖並未被忽視,\x80。\x92 破裂了,這全是你的錯。

column1: Move your ships from \x93, Emperor \x80, we are tired of looking at them. And I am tired of you - consider the \x92 over.
column2: 把你的船艦撤離 \x93,\x80 皇帝,我們看膩了它們。我也受夠了你——就當 \x92 結束了。

column1: Our friendship could have continued, if you had not become so paranoid that you placed military ships in \x93. Our \x92 is history, \x80.
column2: 我們的友誼本可延續,若你不曾變得如此偏執、在 \x93 部署軍艦。我們的 \x92 已成過去,\x80。

column1: The gods abhor those who would destroy planets with biological weaponry. The \x82 Emperor ends our \x92 and prays for your redemption.
column2: 諸神憎惡那些以生化武器摧毀行星之人。\x82 皇帝終止我們的 \x92,並為你的救贖祈禱。

column1: Any nation that uses biological weapons is not fit to be associated with the \x82 Empire. The \x92 is canceled.
column2: 任何使用生化武器的國度都不配與 \x82 帝國往來。\x92 已取消。

column1: The \x81 are nothing but blood thirsty animals. We severe the \x92!
column2: \x81 不過是嗜血的野獸。我們斬斷 \x92!

column1: Have you no morals? Have you no decency? The \x92 is broken beyond repair because of your use of biological horrors!
column2: 你沒有道德嗎?你沒有廉恥嗎?由於你使用生化恐怖武器,\x92 已破裂到無法修復!

column1: We thought the \x81 people were honorable. We welcomed your treaty. Now we see we were deceived, that you are nothing but a rabid pack of baby killers.  The \x92 is gone.
column2: 我們曾以為 \x81 人是高尚的。我們接納了你的條約。如今才知我們被騙了,你不過是一群瘋狂的殺嬰之徒。\x92 沒了。

column1: We can no longer associate ourselves with \x81 butchers. Our \x92 with you is no more.
column2: 我們不能再與 \x81 屠夫往來。我們與你的 \x92 不復存在。

column1: We are sickened by your use of bio-weapons to slaughter innocents, \x80. Emperor \x83 has renounced the \x92.
column2: 你使用生化武器屠殺無辜,令我們作嘔,\x80。\x83 皇帝已宣布放棄 \x92。

column1: The \x92 between the \x82 and the \x81 Empires are hereby dissolved. May the ghosts of the children you murdered haunt you forever.
column2: \x82 與 \x81 帝國之間的 \x92 就此解除。願你所謀殺的孩童亡魂永遠糾纏你。

column1: Remove your blockade, \x80. It is too late to save our \x92, but if you act quickly, you may save yourself a war.
column2: 撤除你的封鎖,\x80。要挽救我們的 \x92 已太遲,但若你迅速行動,或許能替自己免去一場戰爭。

column1: The blockade that you have imposed on the \x82 system is a clear violation of our \x92. If you are not going to honor it, neither will we.
column2: 你對 \x82 星系施加的封鎖顯然違反了我們的 \x92。若你不打算信守它,我們也不會。

column1: The \x92 between the \x82 and \x81 Empires is over. Move your blockade before we come to blows.
column2: \x82 與 \x81 帝國之間的 \x92 結束了。在我們兵戎相見之前,撤走你的封鎖。

column1: The \x82 people will not subjugate themselves to your will any longer. The \x92 is broken, remove your blockade.
column2: \x82 人民不會再屈服於你的意志。\x92 破裂了,撤除你的封鎖。

column1: Our \x92 is canceled. Perhaps when you've removed your blockade, we can renegotiate.
column2: 我們的 \x92 已取消。或許等你撤除封鎖後,我們可以重新談判。

column1: Any hope of keeping the current \x92 alive has been destroyed by your silly blockade of \x82 space.
column2: 想維繫現行 \x92 的任何希望,都被你那愚蠢的 \x82 領域封鎖摧毀了。

column1: It was not wise of you to sign a \x92 with us if you planned on oppressing our people with a blockade. You are on your own now.
column2: 若你打算以封鎖壓迫我們的人民,當初與我們簽署 \x92 就不明智。你現在只能靠自己了。

column1: This needless blockade has signaled the death of the \x92 between the \x81s and the \x82s.
column2: 這場毫無必要的封鎖,宣告了 \x81 與 \x82 之間 \x92 的死亡。

column1: You've been quite busy with your economic expansion, Emperor \x80. Far too busy to remember our little \x92. It expired due to your lack of attention.
column2: 你一直忙於你的經濟擴張,\x80 皇帝。忙到根本無暇記得我們那份小小的 \x92。它因你的疏忽而失效了。

column1: The \x82 Empire does not like your current economic policy. We withdraw the current \x92.
column2: \x82 帝國不喜歡你目前的經濟政策。我們撤回現行的 \x92。

column1: The others are saying that the \x82 people are just riding on the coattails of the rich \x81 Empire. But we don't need anyone's help! The \x92 is severed.
column2: 其他人都說 \x82 人不過是攀附在富有的 \x81 帝國衣尾上。但我們不需要任何人的幫助!\x92 已斬斷。

column1: We no longer require the cooperation of money hungry lunatics. The \x92 is officially dissolved.
column2: 我們不再需要與貪財的瘋子合作。\x92 正式解除。

column1: The \x82s will no longer participate in the \x81 quest for power. Our \x92 is void.
column2: \x82 人不會再參與 \x81 對權力的追逐。我們的 \x92 作廢。

column1: It is no longer in our best interests to have relations with the greedy \x81s. Your \x92 with us is no more.
column2: 與貪婪的 \x81 維持關係已不再符合我們的最佳利益。你與我們的 \x92 不復存在。

column1: Grand Emperor \x83 has declared our \x92 null and void. This is the price of your misplaced vote.
column2: 大皇帝 \x83 已宣布我們的 \x92 無效。這就是你投錯票的代價。

column1: We thought you were our friends, \x80. But a true friend would have supported the \x82s in the Council. Our \x92 is canceled.
column2: 我們還以為你是我們的朋友,\x80。但真正的朋友會在議會支持 \x82 人。我們的 \x92 已取消。

column1: You must not have understood that you owed us your vote in exchange for our generous agreement to a \x92. Never mind, all deals are off.
column2: 你想必是沒搞懂,你欠我們一票,作為我們慷慨同意 \x92 的回報。算了,所有協議都作廢。

column1: Since you were not willing to vote for the \x82 Emperor in the Council meeting, we are not willing to honor the current \x92.
column2: 既然你不願在議會會議上投票給 \x82 皇帝,我們也不願信守現行的 \x92。

column1: Your failure to vote for Emperor \x83 is a clear violation of our current \x92. Consider our relationship ended.
column2: 你未投票給 \x83 皇帝,顯然違反了我們現行的 \x92。就當我們的關係結束了。

column1: The \x92 between us has been canceled, \x80. Next time, place your council vote a little more carefully.
column2: 我們之間的 \x92 已取消,\x80。下次,議會投票時謹慎一點。

column1: If you do not trust the \x82 Empire enough to vote for Emperor \x83, then our friendship must be a sham. The \x92 is canceled.
column2: 若你對 \x82 帝國的信任不足以投票給 \x83 皇帝,那我們的友誼想必是場騙局。\x92 已取消。

column1: Just as it was not convenient for you to vote for Emperor \x83, it is no longer convenient for us to uphold the \x92.
column2: 正如你當初覺得投票給 \x83 皇帝不方便,如今我們也覺得維持 \x92 不方便了。

column1: Enough of your thievery, \x80 there is nothing but war between us now!
column2: 你的竊盜行為夠多了,\x80,如今我們之間只剩戰爭!

column1: You have not stolen enough \x82 technology to defend yourself against us in war!
column2: 你偷的 \x82 科技還不夠讓你在戰爭中抵禦我們!

column1: Your attempts at espionage have lead to war, \x80. The blood is on your hands.
column2: 你的間諜企圖引來了戰爭,\x80。這血債算在你頭上。

column1: Enough games, \x80. No more petty spying and deceit, only full scale war!
column2: 別再耍花招了,\x80。不再有微不足道的刺探與欺瞞,只有全面戰爭!

column1: Emperor \x83 has grown tired of your petty treachery. War has been declared!
column2: \x83 皇帝已厭倦你那些微不足道的背叛。戰爭已宣布!

column1: We are sick of your thievery, \x80. Just because your scientists are unimaginative, it doesn't give you the right to steal technology from ours. We have declared war.
column2: 我們受夠了你的竊盜,\x80。你的科學家缺乏想像力,不代表你有權竊取我們的科技。我們已宣戰。

column1: Your spies have taken their last \x82 technology, \x80. We will destroy you!
column2: 你的間諜偷走了他們最後一項 \x82 科技,\x80。我們將摧毀你!

column1: I hope your spies stole enough technology to strengthen your military, \x80, because you are going to need all the help you can get against the might of the \x82 Empire!
column2: 我希望你的間諜偷了足夠的科技來強化你的軍隊,\x80,因為面對強大的 \x82 帝國,你會需要一切能得到的幫助!

column1: You have destroyed your last \x82 facility. Emperor \x80, we stand at war!
column2: 你破壞了最後一座 \x82 設施。\x80 皇帝,我們開戰了!

column1: The blood spilled now will be \x81 blood, \x80, for you have sabotaged your last \x82 facility.
column2: 如今流的將是 \x81 的血,\x80,因為你破壞了最後一座 \x82 設施。

column1: You leave us no choice. Your malicious sabotage of \x82 property has led mighty \x83 to call for your destruction.
column2: 你讓我們別無選擇。你惡意破壞 \x82 財產,已使強大的 \x83 下令將你毀滅。

column1: Sabotage is the act of a sneak and a coward, \x80. Come out in the open, and meet the \x82s in the field of war!
column2: 破壞是鬼祟懦夫的行徑,\x80。光明正大地出來,在戰場上會會 \x82 人!

column1: It will not be as easy to topple the \x82 Empire as it was to topple a few \x82 buildings. Come, try your best, \x81 scum!
column2: 要推翻 \x82 帝國,可不像推倒幾座 \x82 建築那麼容易。來吧,使出你的全力,\x81 敗類!

column1: We will destroy more than just a few \x81 facilities, \x80. We will destroy your fleets and colonies!
column2: 我們摧毀的可不只是幾座 \x81 設施,\x80。我們將摧毀你的艦隊與殖民地!

column1: Emperor \x83 has declared war on the \x81 nation of saboteurs.
column2: \x83 皇帝已向 \x81 這個破壞者國度宣戰。

column1: We can no longer tolerate the presence of your vast military in the \x93 system. The great \x82 Empire declares war!
column2: 我們再也無法容忍你龐大的軍隊出現在 \x93 星系。偉大的 \x82 帝國宣戰!

column1: You've had long enough to fill the \x93 system with warships. If it's a fight you're looking for, you've found it.
column2: 你有夠多時間讓 \x93 星系填滿戰艦了。若你尋求一戰,你找到了。

column1: The \x82 population has been made uneasy by the vast numbers of ships you've placed in \x93. We will wait no more: we go to war!
column2: \x82 人口因你在 \x93 部署的龐大船艦數量而不安。我們不會再等:我們開戰!

column1: Emperor \x83 has commanded that the forces you've placed in the \x93 system be blown from the sky. We are at war!
column2: \x83 皇帝已下令將你部署在 \x93 星系的部隊自天空炸落。我們開戰了!

column1: The military ships you've placed in \x93 space is an affront to Grand Emperor \x83. These ships will be attacked, as will any \x81 ships or planets that we encounter.
column2: 你部署在 \x93 領域的軍艦是對大皇帝 \x83 的冒犯。這些船艦將遭到攻擊,我們遇上的任何 \x81 船艦或行星亦然。

column1: Any empire willing to use biological weaponry must be eradicated from the galaxy. Prepare to defend yourselves, \x81 murders, \x82 ships are on the attack!
column2: 任何願意使用生化武器的帝國都必須自銀河中根除。準備防禦吧,\x81 兇手,\x82 的船艦已展開攻擊!

column1: Your use of such deplorable weapons is an affront the \x82 gods. We stand at war, \x81 coward.
column2: 你使用如此可鄙的武器,是對 \x82 諸神的冒犯。我們開戰了,\x81 懦夫。

column1: You have mercilessly murdered hordes of innocents with your inhumane weapons. Now the \x82 Empire is poised to crush you, \x80!
column2: 你以不人道的武器無情地謀殺了成群的無辜者。如今 \x82 帝國已準備好粉碎你,\x80!

column1: You have left no middle ground, \x80, only a place of rage, where your enemies line up against you on the left and right. War!
column2: 你沒留下任何中間地帶,\x80,只剩一片憤怒之地,你的敵人在你左右兩側列陣以待。開戰!

column1: Your biological weapons killed innocent people, leaving behind a field of broken hearts and wasted lives. No more, \x80. You will answer for these atrocities with \x81 blood.
column2: 你的生化武器殺害了無辜的人們,留下一片破碎的心與虛擲的生命。夠了,\x80。你將以 \x81 的鮮血,為這些暴行付出代價。

column1: The \x82 people will suffer no more because of your blockade, Emperor \x80. We have entered a state of war.
column2: \x82 人民不會再因你的封鎖受苦了,\x80 皇帝。我們已進入戰爭狀態。

column1: The \x82 people call for action, \x80, and the \x82 Emperor responds: to war with the enemy, the blockade will fall!
column2: \x82 人民要求行動,\x80,\x82 皇帝回應:向敵人開戰,封鎖必將瓦解!

column1: War, \x80, is not a pretty thing. But you've left us no choice, we can no longer lose face in front of the Council because of your blockade.
column2: 戰爭,\x80,不是什麼美好的事。但你讓我們別無選擇,我們不能再因你的封鎖而在議會面前顏面盡失。

column1: Nothing was gained by your blockade of the \x82 system except fear and hatred. The \x82 Emperor has vowed to destroy you, \x80, there is nowhere for you to hide now.
column2: 你對 \x82 星系的封鎖除了恐懼與仇恨,一無所獲。\x82 皇帝已誓言摧毀你,\x80,如今你無處可藏。

column1: Emperor \x83 declared war the minute you put your heinous blockade in place.
column2: 你設下那可惡封鎖的那一刻,\x83 皇帝便已宣戰。

column1: We were waiting for an excuse to destroy you, \x81 oaf. Your absurd blockade is just what we needed.
column2: 我們一直在等一個摧毀你的藉口,\x81 蠢材。你那荒謬的封鎖正是我們需要的。

column1: You will pay for your folly, \x80. First, we will destroy your blockade, then we will destroy you.
column2: 你將為你的愚行付出代價,\x80。首先,我們將摧毀你的封鎖,然後,我們將摧毀你。

column1: You have spent so long building your economy that you have neglected your military. The \x82 military will exploit your weaknesses, we are at war!
column2: 你花了這麼長時間建設經濟,卻忽略了軍隊。\x82 軍隊將利用你的弱點,我們開戰了!

column1: You've grown too big a threat to the balance of economic power in this galaxy, \x80. Once we've blown your ships from the sky, you'll understand the importance of moderation.
column2: 你對這個銀河經濟力量的平衡構成了太大的威脅,\x80。等我們把你的船艦自天空炸落,你就會明白節制的重要。

column1: The \x82 people are not afraid of you, \x80. You may have a full treasury, but we have more skill and courage, and we will beat you at every turn. To war!
column2: \x82 人民不怕你,\x80。你或許有滿滿的國庫,但我們有更多的技巧與勇氣,我們將在每一回合擊敗你。開戰!

column1: This ostentatious display of economic power of yours has no effect on the \x82s, \x80. We do not fear you - to war!
column2: 你這種炫耀經濟力量的浮誇之舉,對 \x82 人毫無作用,\x80。我們不怕你——開戰!

column1: It is time the \x82 Empire stood against the tyranny of the bloated \x81 Empire!
column2: 是時候讓 \x82 帝國挺身對抗臃腫的 \x81 帝國之暴政了!

column1: We had counted on your vote in the Council, \x80 and now, we count on nothing more than your destruction. After all, the vote of the dead count for naught!
column2: 我們本指望你在議會的一票,\x80,如今,我們只指望你的毀滅。畢竟,死人的一票一文不值!

column1: The \x82 Emperor does not need your vote, \x81 scum, for we will have your head!
column2: \x82 皇帝不需要你的一票,\x81 敗類,因為我們要的是你的項上人頭!

column1: You made a grave mistake casting your vote against the glorious \x82 Empire. It is a mistake you will regret fully, as you watch your planets burn and your people die!
column2: 你投票反對光榮的 \x82 帝國,犯了嚴重的錯誤。當你眼睜睜看著你的行星焚燒、你的人民死去,你將徹底後悔這個錯誤!

column1: You meant to vote for the \x82 Emperor, not against, didn't you? Well, history is made of such mistakes. Once we have eradicated the \x81 Empire, the historians can work it out.
column2: 你本想投票給 \x82 皇帝,而非反對,是吧?嗯,歷史正是由這樣的錯誤構成的。等我們根除了 \x81 帝國,史學家自會去釐清。

column1: The fight that began in the Council when you voted against us will be finished on the battlefield, \x80.
column2: 那場在議會因你投票反對我們而起的爭鬥,將在戰場上了結,\x80。

column1: We will either weaken you to the point that you will vote any way we like, or we will destroy you utterly. It really matters little to us!
column2: 我們要嘛把你削弱到你會照我們的意思投任何票,要嘛就徹底摧毀你。這對我們來說其實無關緊要!

column1: Emperor \x83 earned your vote, \x80. Now you have earned our wrath! The \x81 Empire must fall!
column2: \x83 皇帝贏得了你的一票,\x80。如今你贏得了我們的怒火!\x81 帝國必須殞落!

column1: Emperor \x83 sees no reason for the \x81 Empire to exist since you are so willing to throw your vote away. War has been declared.
column2: \x83 皇帝看不出 \x81 帝國有存在的理由,既然你如此樂意浪費你的一票。戰爭已宣布。

column1: You have dishonored the \x82 Nation, you \x81 clod. Now you must pay for your mistake on the battlefield.
column2: 你羞辱了 \x82 國度,你這 \x81 蠢蛋。如今你必須在戰場上為你的錯誤付出代價。

column1: Your impetuous actions have lead to war!
column2: 你魯莽的行動引來了戰爭!

column1: You have discredited the great and wise Emperor \x83. We will extract our vengeance in \x81 blood.
column2: 你使偉大而睿智的 \x83 皇帝蒙羞。我們將以 \x81 的鮮血取得復仇。

column1: You have insulted the honorable Emperor \x83. Perhaps a short war will teach you to hold your impetuous tongue.
column2: 你侮辱了尊貴的 \x83 皇帝。或許一場短暫的戰爭能教你管住你魯莽的舌頭。

column1: We have nothing but scorn for \x81 ruffians. War has been declared.
column2: 我們對 \x81 惡棍只有輕蔑。戰爭已宣布。

column1: Emperor \x83 has authorized an attack on the \x81 Empire to celebrate the fact that we are now at war.
column2: \x83 皇帝已批准對 \x81 帝國發動攻擊,以慶祝我們如今已進入戰爭。

column1: Emperor \x83 is unable to hold the \x82 military in check, such is their hatred of you. As we speak, ships draw near to go to war.
column2: \x83 皇帝無法約束 \x82 軍隊,他們對你的憎恨如此之深。就在我們交談之際,船艦正逼近以開戰。

column1: We just don't like \x81s. Perhaps when you're all enslaved or dead, we will raise our opinion.
column2: 我們就是不喜歡 \x81。或許等你們全被奴役或死光,我們對你們的看法會好一點。

column1: There is such anger and mistrust against the \x81 people that we can no longer silence those calling for blood. To war, then.
column2: 對 \x81 人的憤怒與不信任如此強烈,我們再也無法讓那些喊著要血債的人噤聲。那麼,開戰吧。

column1: We have tried to bolster the failing diplomatic relationship between our Empires, but this can go on no longer. No more talking, now we go to war.
column2: 我們曾試圖強化我們兩國之間衰敗的外交關係,但這無法再繼續下去了。不再有談判,現在我們開戰。

column1: We will listen to no more of your diplomatic blustering. The grand Emperor \x83 has declared war on the worthless \x81 Empire.
column2: 我們不會再聽你那些外交上的虛張聲勢。大皇帝 \x83 已向無用的 \x81 帝國宣戰。

column1: Emperor \x83 has declared an end to all treaties between the \x82 and hated \x81 Empires.
column2: \x83 皇帝已宣告終止 \x82 與可恨的 \x81 帝國之間的一切條約。

column1: The \x82 Empire is honoring its alliances by declaring war on the pathetic \x91 Empire.
column2: \x82 帝國正藉由向可悲的 \x91 帝國宣戰來信守其同盟。

column1: We have noticed your espionage attempts, \x80, so we are sending some ships to remind you not to trifle with us. War has begun!
column2: 我們注意到了你的間諜企圖,\x80,因此我們正派出一些船艦提醒你別跟我們胡鬧。戰爭已開始!

column1: A little payback for your sabotage attacks, \x80. War!
column2: 為你的破壞攻擊做點小小的回報,\x80。開戰!

column1: Your military buildup is creating some itchy \x82 trigger fingers, \x80. We've decided to declare war.
column2: 你的軍事集結讓一些 \x82 人手癢想扣扳機,\x80。我們已決定宣戰。

column1: Emperor \x83 was so horrified to learn of your usage of bio-weapons that an attack was authorized. We are now at war.
column2: \x83 皇帝得知你使用生化武器後大為驚駭,遂批准了一次攻擊。我們如今開戰了。

column1: We do not appreciate the blockade you have in place, \x80. We now declare full scale war!
column2: 我們不欣賞你設下的封鎖,\x80。我們現在宣布全面戰爭!

column1: Time to knock you down a peg or two with a quick offensive, \x80. You are now at war with the \x82 Empire!
column2: 是時候用一次迅速的攻勢殺殺你的威風了,\x80。你如今與 \x82 帝國開戰了!

column1: You were supposed to vote for Emperor \x83. Some \x82 ships will show up to remind you of that. We are now at war.
column2: 你本該投票給 \x83 皇帝。一些 \x82 船艦將現身提醒你這點。我們如今開戰了。

column1: Did you think we would stand idly by while you slaughter innocent \x82 people? We will destroy you!
column2: 你以為我們會袖手旁觀,任你屠殺無辜的 \x82 人民?我們將摧毀你!

column1: How dare you enter \x82 space and attack one of our colonies. Beware, \x80 for such treachery will be answered in kind.
column2: 你竟敢進入 \x82 領域攻擊我們的一座殖民地。當心,\x80,這種背叛將遭到同等回應。

column1: Emperor \x83 has withdrawn for the traditional mourning period for those  of \x86 star system. We have been left with orders to destroy any \x81 fleets we encounter.
column2: \x83 皇帝已為 \x86 星系的亡者退隱,進行傳統的哀悼期。我們奉命摧毀任何遇上的 \x81 艦隊。

column1: Your senseless attack in the \x86 colony has enraged the \x82 people, \x80. The Emperor has authorized full scale retaliation.
column2: 你在 \x86 殖民地無謂的攻擊激怒了 \x82 人民,\x80。皇帝已批准全面報復。

column1: Any hope of the \x81 people and the \x82 Empire coexisting peacefully ended when your military attacked the colony in the \x86 system.
column2: 當你的軍隊攻擊 \x86 星系的殖民地時,\x81 人與 \x82 帝國和平共存的任何希望都結束了。

column1: Your cruel assault on our planet in the \x86 system will not go unanswered, \x80. We are now at war!
column2: 你對我們 \x86 星系行星殘忍的攻擊不會沒有回應,\x80。我們如今開戰了!

column1: Your unjustified attack on our colony was the last straw, Emperor \x80. \x81 blood will run in the streets!
column2: 你對我們殖民地毫無正當理由的攻擊是最後一根稻草,\x80 皇帝。\x81 的鮮血將流淌街頭!

column1: When you ordered the attack on \x82 ships, you crossed the line, \x80. Now it's our turn, and we will not stop until not one \x81 remains in the sky.
column2: 當你下令攻擊 \x82 船艦時,你就越線了,\x80。如今輪到我們了,不將天空中的 \x81 趕盡殺絕,我們絕不罷休。

column1: It is a shame you decided to target \x82 ships, \x80, for now we have set our sights on destroying the entire \x81 Empire!
column2: 你決定鎖定 \x82 船艦,真是可惜,\x80,因為如今我們已把目標鎖定在摧毀整個 \x81 帝國!

column1: It was foolish of you to turn your weapons on \x82 ships. Now you must be destroyed.
column2: 你把武器對準 \x82 船艦真是愚蠢。如今你必須被摧毀。

column1: Your vicious attack on \x82 fleets has prompted a declaration of war, \x80. Your destruction is now inevitable.
column2: 你對 \x82 艦隊惡毒的攻擊招致了宣戰,\x80。你的毀滅如今無可避免。

column1: We are now at war, \x80 of the \x81s. We will teach you not to provoke the \x82 Empire!
column2: 我們如今開戰了,\x81 的 \x80。我們要教你別激怒 \x82 帝國!

column1: Emperor \x83 has ordered the military to destroy every \x81 fleet they encounter. Now it is our turn to target your ships, \x80.
column2: \x83 皇帝已下令軍隊摧毀每一支遇上的 \x81 艦隊。如今輪到我們鎖定你的船艦了,\x80。

column1: The \x81 attacks on \x82 ships will not go unanswered, Emperor \x80. Prepare to defend yourself against our mighty war engine.
column2: \x81 對 \x82 船艦的攻擊不會沒有回應,\x80 皇帝。準備好抵禦我們強大的戰爭機器吧。

column1: The \x82 Empire lost some good soldiers when you attacked our fleet, \x80. Prepare to pay!
column2: 你攻擊我們艦隊時,\x82 帝國失去了一些優秀的士兵,\x80。準備付出代價!

column1: I don't like you, \x80, I never have. I am proud to bear this message from Emperor \x83: we will blow your ships from the sky!
column2: 我不喜歡你,\x80,從來就不喜歡。我很自豪能傳達 \x83 皇帝的這則訊息:我們將把你的船艦自天空炸落!

column1: We shall make an example of you for others who would resist the might of the \x82 empire.We hereby vow to eradicate all \x81 vermin infesting the galaxy.
column2: 我們要拿你殺雞儆猴,警告其他膽敢抵抗 \x82 帝國之力的人。我們在此立誓,要根除所有荼毒銀河的 \x81 害蟲。

column1: The mighty \x82 Empire will destroy you, \x80.
column2: 強大的 \x82 帝國將摧毀你,\x80。

column1: Our nations stand at war, \x80. We will happily watch your empire crumble.
column2: 我們兩國開戰了,\x80。我們將樂於看你的帝國崩塌。

column1: We have decided to do you the honor of entering into war with you. You are lucky: we only do battle with those we respect.
column2: 我們決定給你與我們開戰的榮幸。你很幸運:我們只與我們尊敬的對手交戰。

column1: Mighty Emperor \x83 is pleased to announce open season on all \x81 animals. To the hunt!
column2: 強大的 \x83 皇帝很高興地宣布,對所有 \x81 走獸開放狩獵季。開始狩獵吧!

column1: Our emperor has declared war. When all is said and done, only one empire will remain.
column2: 我們的皇帝已宣戰。一切塵埃落定後,只會有一個帝國存留。

column1: Although we have strived for peace on a diplomatic level, our citizenry cries for \x81 blood. We have no choice but to seek it for them.
column2: 儘管我們在外交層面力求和平,我們的人民卻高喊著要 \x81 的血。我們別無選擇,只能為他們去取。

column1: Prepare to feel the might of the great \x82 military!
column2: 準備好感受偉大 \x82 軍隊之力吧!

column1: There is too much bad blood between our empires, \x80. It is time this was decided once and for all, on the battlefield and in the skies.
column2: 我們兩國之間積怨太深,\x80。是時候在戰場與天空中,一勞永逸地了結此事了。

column1: Emperor \x83 has declared war on your people.
column2: \x83 皇帝已向你的人民宣戰。

column1: Finally, Emperor \x83 has given us the command we've been waiting for: we attack at will!
column2: 終於,\x83 皇帝下達了我們一直等待的命令:我們隨意攻擊!

column1: Enough of this endless war, Emperor \x80. We propose peace between the \x82 nation and the \x81 Empire.
column2: 這場無盡的戰爭夠了,\x80 皇帝。我們提議 \x82 國度與 \x81 帝國之間和平。

column1: This war has gone on long enough, \x80. Accept this offer of a peace treaty between our great empires.
column2: 這場戰爭打得夠久了,\x80。接受這份我們兩大帝國之間的和平條約提議吧。

column1: We could go on fighting, but I believe there is more to be gained from peace. Will you accept an offer of peace from the \x82 Empire?
column2: 我們可以繼續打下去,但我相信和平能帶來更多。你願意接受 \x82 帝國的和平提議嗎?

column1: There is no need for both our races to continue to suffer in this war. Let us declare peace, and there will be joy throughout the galaxy.
column2: 我們兩族沒有必要在這場戰爭中繼續受苦。讓我們宣布和平,銀河將充滿喜悅。

column1: Great \x80, our war has been a tremendous strain on both our peoples. Sign a peace treaty so we can end this senseless bickering.
column2: 偉大的 \x80,我們的戰爭對我們兩族人民都是極大的負擔。簽署和平條約吧,好讓我們終結這場無謂的爭吵。

column1: The \x82 people are a peace loving nation at heart, \x80. End this war, and join us in peace.
column2: \x82 人民骨子裡是個愛好和平的國度,\x80。終結這場戰爭,與我們一同和平共處吧。

column1: The \x81 Empire has proven worthy of our friendship, Emperor \x80. Sign a peace treaty, that we may live together in harmony.
column2: \x81 帝國已證明配得上我們的友誼,\x80 皇帝。簽署和平條約吧,好讓我們和諧共處。

column1: This war could drag on forever, Emperor \x80, and bleed us both dry. Let's end this now, and declare a peace between our nations.
column2: 這場戰爭可能永無止境,\x80 皇帝,並將我們雙方都榨乾。現在就了結吧,宣布我們兩國之間和平。

column1: We will agree to peace between our empire if you give us something in exchange: \x90.
column2: 若你給我們一些東西作為交換,我們將同意我們兩帝國之間和平:\x90。

column1: Emperor \x83 so desires peace that we offer a gift in exchange for your agreement: \x90.
column2: \x83 皇帝如此渴望和平,以至於我們願提供一份禮物換取你的同意:\x90。

column1: Time has come for peace between our empires, \x80. To show our sincerity, I offer you a gift: \x90.
column2: 我們兩帝國之間和平的時候到了,\x80。為表誠意,我獻上一份禮物:\x90。

column1: Emperor \x83 calls upon you to honor the Alliance, \x80. You must declare war on the \x91 Empire!
column2: \x83 皇帝呼籲你信守同盟,\x80。你必須向 \x91 帝國宣戰!

column1: The \x82 people call upon our brothers the \x81 people to declare war on the evil \x91 Empire. Long live our Alliance!
column2: \x82 人民呼籲我們的弟兄 \x81 人民,向邪惡的 \x91 帝國宣戰。我們的同盟萬歲!

column1: You are foolish to disregard your duties as set forth by our Alliance, \x80. Since you will not honor it, the Alliance is no more!
column2: 你無視同盟所訂的義務,真是愚蠢,\x80。既然你不願信守,同盟就此作廢!

column1: Thank you for honoring the Grand \x81/\x82 Alliance. Death to our sworn enemies!
column2: 感謝你信守偉大的 \x81/\x82 同盟。讓我們的死敵滅亡!

column1: Emperor \x83 thanks you for entering into such a fruitful trade treaty with the \x82 Empire.
column2: \x83 皇帝感謝你與 \x82 帝國締結如此豐碩的貿易條約。

column1: We have profited greatly from our trade treaty, mighty Emperor \x80, thank you for honoring the agreement.
column2: 我們的貿易條約獲利甚豐,強大的 \x80 皇帝,感謝你信守協議。

column1: Our scientists have learned much from your people, \x80. Thank you for the research treaty.
column2: 我們的科學家從你的人民身上學到許多,\x80。感謝你的研究條約。

column1: The research treaty between our empires is a great benefit to us all. Thanks for honoring the agreement.
column2: 我們兩帝國之間的研究條約對我們所有人都大有裨益。感謝你信守協議。

column1: We received the annual tribute you promised. Thank you for prompt payment.
column2: 我們收到了你承諾的年度貢金。感謝你及時付款。

column1: Your payment of the annual tribute to great Emperor \x83 was received. Thank you.
column2: 你向偉大的 \x83 皇帝繳納的年度貢金已收到。謝謝。

column1: We received the reward you promised us for military intervention, Emperor \x80. Thanks.
column2: 我們收到了你承諾的軍事介入酬謝,\x80 皇帝。謝了。

column1: Thank you for your vote for  Emperor \x83 in the Council meeting. With enough support, the \x82 Empire will soon assume its rightful place as galactic leaders.
column2: 感謝你在議會會議上投票給 \x83 皇帝。有了足夠的支持,\x82 帝國很快就會登上其應得的銀河領袖之位。

column1: Your recent vote for Emperor \x83 is greatly appreciated, Emperor \x80.
column2: 十分感謝你近來投票給 \x83 皇帝,\x80 皇帝。

column1: You made a wise decision to vote for Emperor \x83. We will not soon forget your support.
column2: 你投票給 \x83 皇帝是個明智的決定。我們不會很快忘記你的支持。

column1: Your vote for Emperor \x83 is an optimistic sign for the future of our diplomatic relationship.
column2: 你投票給 \x83 皇帝,是我們外交關係未來樂觀的徵兆。

column1: Emperor \x83 was pleasantly surprised by your vote at the meeting of the Council, Emperor \x80. Perhaps soon we will return the favor.
column2: 你在議會會議上的投票令 \x83 皇帝驚喜,\x80 皇帝。或許我們很快便會回報你的恩情。

column1: The \x82 people have taken notice of your vote for Emperor \x83. The popularity of the \x81 race has never been so high.
column2: \x82 人民注意到了你投票給 \x83 皇帝。\x81 種族的聲望從未如此之高。

column1: We applaud your decision to vote for Emperor \x83. We hope all your future diplomatic decisions are so wisely made.
column2: 我們讚許你投票給 \x83 皇帝的決定。願你未來所有的外交決定都能如此明智。

column1: Emperor \x83 is proud to have your support, Emperor \x80. A few more votes, and the Council will be in good hands.
column2: \x83 皇帝很自豪能得到你的支持,\x80 皇帝。再多幾票,議會就會落入可靠之手。

column1: Your recent vote for Emperor \x83 is greatly appreciated, Emperor \x80.  We bestow upon you:\x90.
column2: 十分感謝你近來投票給 \x83 皇帝,\x80 皇帝。我們賜予你:\x90。

column1: I grant you a gift in exchange for your recent council vote: \x90.
column2: 我賜予你一份禮物,以回報你近來的議會投票:\x90。

column1: We thank you for your vote for Emperor \x83 in the elections. For your trouble, we give you: \x90.
column2: 我們感謝你在選舉中投票給 \x83 皇帝。為酬謝你的辛勞,我們給你:\x90。

column1: Let us formalize the friendship between the \x82 and \x81 peoples by agreeing to a Non-Aggression Pact.
column2: 讓我們簽署互不侵犯條約,將 \x82 與 \x81 人民之間的友誼正式化。

column1: We feel no ill will towards the \x81 Empire. Let us agree to a Non-Aggression Pact so we may both concentrate on our true enemies.
column2: 我們對 \x81 帝國毫無惡意。讓我們簽署互不侵犯條約,好讓我們雙方都能專注於真正的敵人。

column1: A Non-Aggression treaty between the \x82 Empire and the \x81 Empire will symbolize to all our great respect for each other.
column2: \x82 帝國與 \x81 帝國之間的互不侵犯條約,將向所有人象徵我們對彼此的高度敬重。

column1: Why waste resources watching our backs where the \x81 Empire is concerned? Join with us in a Non-Aggression Pact, so all will understand our willingness to work together.
column2: 何必為了防範 \x81 帝國而浪費資源在背後戒備?與我們簽署互不侵犯條約,好讓所有人都明白我們願意合作。

column1: We are a peaceful people, so are the noble \x81. Why not agree on a policy of mutual Non-Aggression between us?
column2: 我們是愛好和平的民族,尊貴的 \x81 亦然。何不同意我們之間互不侵犯的方針?
